title: Sky Bet League One & League Two Play-Off Final kick-off times confirmed
text: The English Football League has confirmed kick-off times for the Sky Bet League One and Sky Bet League Two Play-Off Finals at Wembley Stadium. The League One play-off final between the winners of the Stockport vs Stevenage and Bolton vs Bradford semi-final ties takes place on Sunday May 24. The League Two play-off final between the winners of the Salford vs Grimsby and Notts County vs Chesterfield semi-final ties takes place on Monday May 25 (Bank Holiday). Both finals will be broadcast live on Sky Sports.
